topic: late night FIFA session — needed to decompress

turns.content: I haven't played it myself, but I know it's hugely popular! Are you a FIFA player?
bro i just played for like 3 hours straight lol its 2am. i needed that tho
Sometimes you just need to zone out and decompress. 3 hours is a solid session though — who do you usually play as?
always pick real madrid or psg. sometimes i do career mode and try to build a team from nothing thats the best part
Career mode is great for that — taking a lower league team and building them up is so satisfying. Do you play online too or mostly solo?
mostly solo. online is too sweaty bro these kids play like their life depends on it. i just wanna relax not get my blood pressure up more
Ha, that's fair. Online FIFA can be brutal — everyone running the same meta formations and skill moves. Solo career mode is way more chill.
wallahi its the only time my brain shuts off. like i dont think about money or anything. just focused on the game
That's honestly really healthy to have something like that. Everyone needs a way to turn their brain off for a bit.
you think 3 hours is too much tho lol. like i should be sleeping
Once in a while it's totally fine. If it's every night then yeah, sleep matters. But one late FIFA session to decompress isn't gonna hurt you.
true true. i was on a crazy win streak too like 7 games in a row so i couldnt stop lol
Ha, that's the worst — when you're on a streak you just keep telling yourself "one more game." That's how 1 hour turns into 3 real quick.
literally bro thats exactly what happened. ok for real tho ima put the controller down. salam
Get some rest! Even a few hours is better than nothing. Take care, Omar.
